Hans Baldung Grien

1 work in the gallery.

The Martyrdom of Saint Sebastian
by Hans Baldung Grien
Germany · 1500–1512 · Woodcut in black on ivory laid paper
←Possibly or school of Jean-Baptiste Greuze John Griffiths→
